TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qutux_niqan, title = qutux_niqan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qutux_niqan} }

S.FORM: qutux niqan Watan, isu ru Yumi ga, qutax balay na qutux niqan. Watan, isu ru Yumi ga, balay na niqan na llpyung
qutux niqan Watan, isu ru Yumi ga, qutax balay na qutux niqan. Watan, isu ru Yumi ga, balay na niqan na llpyung
S.PHON: qutux niqan watan, is~ɕu ru jumi ɣa, qutax βalaj na qutux niqan. watan, is~ɕu ru jumi ɣa, βalaj na niqan na llpjuŋ
